Joyful Trains | JR-EAST
# Joyful Trains
*
![satono image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_satono.jpg)
![satono logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_satono.png)
SATONO
Relaxing train rides filled with the warmth of a hometown
*
![Hinabi image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_hinabi.jpg)
![Hinabi logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_hinabi.png)
Hinabi
A getaway to connect with the local area on a relaxing railway journey
*
![KAIRI image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_kairi.jpg)
![KAIRI logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_kairi.png)
KAIRI
Enjoy Niigata and Shonai cuisine and the beautiful vistas
*
![Koshino Shu*Kura image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_koshinoshukura.jpg)
![Koshino Shu*Kura logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_koshinoshukura.png)
Koshino Shu\*Kura
This train was built around the concept of sake
*
![TOHOKU EMOTION image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_tohokuemotion.jpg)
![TOHOKU EMOTION logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_tohokuemotion.png)
TOHOKU EMOTION
The Restaurant Train TOHOKU EMOTION
*
![Oykot image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_oykot.jpg)
![Oykot logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_oykot.png)
Oykot
Iikawa Iisora Iiyama Line Hometown trip to return to that day
*
![Resort Shirakami (Buna / Aoike / Kumagera) image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_resortshirakami.jpg)
![Resort Shirakami (Buna / Aoike / Kumagera) logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_resortshirakami.png)
Resort Shirakami (Buna / Aoike / Kumagera)
In search of a superb view Take a trip on the Gono Line
*
![Resort View Furusato image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_resortviewfurusato.jpg)
![Resort View Furusato logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_resortviewfurusato.png)
Resort View Furusato
Take in the beautiful scenery from this train and reminisce about your hometown.
*
![SL Gunma image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_slgunma.jpg)
![SL Gunma logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_slgunma.png)
SL Gunma
Historic steam engines A scenic trip through the Gunma countryside
*
![HIGH RAIL 1375 image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_highrail1375.jpg)
![HIGH RAIL 1375 logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_highrail1375.png)
HIGH RAIL 1375
Panoramic starry skies seen from the train closest to the sky
*
![B.B.BASE image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_bbbase.jpg)
![B.B.BASE logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_bbbase.png)
B.B.BASE
Train and bicycle new journey
*
![POKÉMON with YOU Train image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_pokemonwithyoutrain.jpg)
![POKÉMON with YOU Train logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_pokemonwithyoutrain.png)
POKÉMON with YOU Train
Pokémon visits for bringing smiles to the whole family
*
![SL Banetsu Monogatari image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_mv_slider_slbanetsumonogatari.jpg)
![SL Banetsu Monogatari logo](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/common/logo_slbanetsumonogatari.png)
SL Banetsu Monogatari
Railway of forests, water, and adventure, fun for the whole family
## のってたのしい列車とは
A Joyful Train is not only a means of transportation, but also a package of various pleasures, allowing for the train journey itself to become the purpose of travel.
## 地図からさがす
* 北東北地域
* 南東北地域
* 信越地域
* 関東・伊豆地域

* [![](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/img/top/img_enjoy_event.jpg)
車内・
イベント
](#searchEvent)
利用可能なパス
以下のパスをお持ちの場合、対象の列車に追加料金無しでご乗車いただけます。ご乗車には、事前に指定席のご予約が必要です。
* JR EAST PASS (Tohoku area)
* JR Tohoku-South Hokkaido Rail Pass
* JR EAST PASS (Nagano,Niigata area)
* JR TOKYO Wide Pass
* JR East-South Hokkaido Rail Pass
* ※臨時列車等、行き先が異なる場合は対応が変更となる場合があります。
* ※一部区間にて乗車可能なパスも含んでおります。
### 車内グルメを楽しむ
*
![]()
PLAY MOVIE(日本語のみ)

## 対象のパスから探す
以下のパスを購⼊すると、対象のJoyful Trainに追加料⾦無しでご乗⾞いただけます。ご乗⾞には、パスの購⼊とは別に事前に指定席のご予約が必要です。
※⼀部区間にてご乗⾞可能なパスも含んでおります。
* JR EAST PASS (Tohoku area)
乗車できる列車
[SATONO](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/satono.html)
[Hinabi](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/joyful/hinabi.html)

Children (6 - 11 years old)

¥24,000 (10days)
5 days or 10 days of unlimited travel on trains and Shinkansen in the area covered!
